blurb_en: OpenAI shut down the Sora consumer app on April 26, ending the AI video experiment it launched in December 2024 after less than a year and a half. The model was reportedly burning through an estimated $1 million per day in compute costs and never attracted a user base large enough to sustain it. Nine days before the shutdown, three executives departed in quick succession: Bill Peebles, who built Sora; Kevin Weil, who led the science division; and Srinivas Narayanan, the enterprise CTO. OpenAI described the pivot as shedding "side quests" in favor of enterprise. The Sora API lives until September 24 — time enough to plan a proper exit, or to pretend none of this happened.
blurb_zh: OpenAI 于 4 月 26 日关闭了 Sora 消费者应用程序，这个于 2024 年 12 月上线的 AI 视频产品不到一年半便宣告终结。据报道，该模型每天烧掉约 100 万美元的算力成本，却始终未能积累足够的用户群。关闭前九天，三位高管相继离职：Sora 的缔造者 Bill Peebles、科学团队负责人 Kevin Weil，以及企业技术总监 Srinivas Narayanan。OpenAI 将此次转型定性为剥离
，聚焦企业产品。Sora API 尚存一口气，维持至 9 月 24 日——足够时间做好善后，或装作什么都没发生过。
verification_notes: Executive exits confirmed via TechCrunch (April 17) and CNBC (April 17). App shutdown confirmed via OpenAI Help Center and The Decoder. $1M/day compute figure is estimated — treated as reported, not independently confirmed. API sunset September 24 confirmed via OpenAI Help Center.

blurb_en: An anonymous AI video model appeared on the Artificial Analysis Video Arena on April 7, immediately claimed the top spot in blind testing for both text-to-video and image-to-video, and was revealed three days later to be Alibaba's work. HappyHorse-1.0, built by the Future Life Lab inside Alibaba's Taotian Group, generates video and audio jointly in a single pass at 1080p, with native lip-sync in seven languages across 15 billion parameters. Developer access opened on fal.ai on April 27 at $0.14 per second for 720p. The model's lead engineer, Zhang Di, previously built Kling at Kuaishou before returning to Alibaba. HappyHorse is how that story ends.
blurb_zh: 4 月 7 日，一个匿名 AI 视频模型现身 Artificial Analysis Video Arena，在文生视频和图生视频两项盲测排行中双双夺得头名，三天后被揭晓为阿里巴巴出品。HappyHorse-1.0 由阿里淘天集团旗下 Future Life Lab 打造，150 亿参数，单次前向传播即可联合生成视频与音频，支持 1080p 输出及七种语言的原生口型同步。4 月 27 日，开发者访问权限已在 fal.ai 正式开放，720p 定价 0.14 美元/秒。该模型首席工程师张迪此前在快手主导开发了 Kling，之后回归阿里。HappyHorse 就是这个故事的结尾。
verification_notes: Alibaba as creator confirmed via CNBC (April 10) and Bloomberg (April 10). fal API launch April 27 confirmed via PR Newswire press release and fal.ai official page. Architecture (15B params, 7-language lip-sync, 1080p) from fal.ai and PR Newswire. Benchmark position (#1 on Artificial Analysis Video Arena) confirmed across multiple sources. Zhang Di background confirmed via PR Newswire.

blurb_en: Taylor Swift's company TAS Rights Management filed three trademark applications with the U.S. Patent and Trademark Office: two covering audio recordings of her saying "Hey, it's Taylor Swift" and "Hey, it's Taylor," and one covering a stage photograph. Unlike copyright, trademark infringement suits apply federally, work nationally, and don't require proving individual instances of copying — making them a more powerful instrument against AI voice cloning at scale. Swift's voice has already appeared without consent in AI-generated ads, political campaigns, and explicit content. The applications don't block AI voice generation broadly. They give Swift's lawyers a weapon with teeth for anything that sounds specifically like her.
blurb_zh: 泰勒·斯威夫特的公司 TAS Rights Management 向美国专利商标局提交了三项商标申请：两项涵盖其特定声音录音（分别为
和
），一项覆盖舞台照片。与版权不同，商标侵权诉讼在联邦层面展开，适用于全国，且无需逐一证明复制行为——这使其成为对抗大规模 AI 声音克隆的更有力工具。此前，Swift 的声音已在未经授权的情况下出现于 AI 生成的广告、政治活动和露骨内容中。此次申请并不全面禁止 AI 声音生成，只是为 Swift 的律师提供了一件对
的内容具有实际杀伤力的武器。
verification_notes: Confirmed via Variety (April 27) and CNN (April 28). Three USPTO trademark filings confirmed. Two sound marks covering specific audio phrases, one image mark confirmed. Legal analysis of trademark vs. copyright confirmed by multiple legal sources including TechRadar and Northeastern University commentary. Note: this is a trademark filing, not a lawsuit.

blurb_en: ElevenLabs launched ElevenMusic on April 30, expanding from voice cloning into a full AI music platform for generating, remixing, and streaming tracks via natural language prompts. The company signed licensing deals with Kobalt, Merlin, and SourceAudio before launch, opening with around 4,000 human artists opted in — mostly emerging acts. Free users get seven songs per day; $9.99 per month buys 400. The approach contrasts with Suno and Udio, which trained on unlicensed material and settled major copyright suits afterward. ElevenLabs, valued at $11 billion after a February funding round, is betting that being licensed from day one is worth more than moving fast and cleaning up later.
blurb_zh: ElevenLabs 于 4 月 30 日推出 ElevenMusic，从声音克隆业务扩展至完整的 AI 音乐平台，支持通过自然语言提示生成、混音和流媒体播放曲目。该公司在发布前已与 Kobalt、Merlin 和 SourceAudio 签署授权协议，首发时约 4,000 位人类歌手（大多为新兴歌手）选择加入。免费用户每天可生成七首歌曲，9.99 美元/月套餐提供每月 400 首额度。这与 Suno 和 Udio 的路线截然不同——后两者使用未授权素材训练模型，事后才与版权方达成和解。身价 110 亿美元的 ElevenLabs 押注了另一个方向：从第一天起就拿到授权，比先快速推进再事后善后更值得。
verification_notes: Platform launch April 30 confirmed via Music Ally and Billboard. App originally launched April 2 per TechCrunch. Licensing deals (Kobalt, Merlin, SourceAudio) confirmed across multiple sources. 4,000 artists and daily/monthly generation limits confirmed via Music Ally and AlternativeTo. $11B valuation from February 2026 Series C per multiple reports.

blurb_en: Connecticut's House passed Senate Bill 5 on May 1 by 131-17, requiring employers to disclose to workers and job applicants when AI is a "substantial factor" in an employment decision. The bill also bars companies from using automated decision tools as a shield against existing anti-discrimination law. Governor Ned Lamont has said he will sign it — a reversal from last year, when he threatened to veto the bill over concerns about burdening business. Senator James Maroney spent three years moving the legislation through. The law doesn't prohibit AI in hiring or firing decisions. It just requires the company mention it.
blurb_zh: 康涅狄格州众议院于 5 月 1 日以 131-17 的票数通过了参议院第 5 号法案，要求雇主在 AI 对雇用决定起
时告知员工和求职者。法案还明确规定，使用自动决策系统不能豁免雇主依现行反歧视法承担的责任。州长内德·拉蒙特表示将签署该法案——去年他曾以可能给企业带来负担为由威胁动用否决权。参议员詹姆斯·马罗尼花了三年时间将其推过终点线。法律并不禁止公司在招聘或裁员决定中使用 AI，只要求公司说一声。
verification_notes: Confirmed via CT Mirror (May 1) as primary local source. Also covered by Hartford Business Journal and Pluribus News. House vote 131-17 and Senate vote 32-4 confirmed. Governor Lamont stated intent to sign confirmed via CT Mirror.

blurb_en: Midjourney released V8.1 on April 30, the second update to its V8 architecture since the March alpha. The headlining improvement is text rendering: generated images now produce legible, accurate typography — street signs, product labels, poster copy — where the model had previously been the industry's most reliable producer of nonsense. The update also brings roughly 5x speed improvement over V7 and native 2K output. For commercial designers, legible text in generated imagery has been the missing piece for any production-ready workflow. Midjourney quietly fixed it on a Thursday.
blurb_zh: Midjourney 于 4 月 30 日发布 V8.1，这是 3 月 Alpha 版本以来 V8 架构的第二次更新。最大亮点是文字渲染：生成图像中的文本——路牌、产品标签、海报文案——现在终于清晰可读，而此前该模型在这方面长期是行业最可靠的乱码制造机。此次更新还带来了约五倍于 V7 的速度提升和原生 2K 输出支持。对商业设计师而言，图像中的清晰文字是任何可交付工作流中最后一块缺失的拼图。Midjourney 悄悄在一个周四把它补上了。
verification_notes: V8.1 release on April 30 confirmed via Midjourney official updates page and multiple independent sources (ProgressiveRobot preview, WaveSpeedAI). V8 alpha launched March 17 confirmed via Midjourney. Text rendering as key improvement and 5x speed over V7 confirmed across multiple reviews. 2K native output confirmed.

blurb_en: OpenAI launched GPT Image 2 on April 21 — its first image model with native reasoning, using O-series thinking to plan and self-check before generating a pixel. The model supports up to 2K resolution, produces up to eight coherent images from a single prompt with consistent characters across the set, and follows complex editing instructions across conversation turns. The launch also closes the DALL-E chapter: DALL-E 2 and DALL-E 3 APIs shut down May 12, replaced by gpt-image-2. DALL-E launched in 2021, made AI image generation legible to the public, and lasted five years before being absorbed into a model with no proper name.
blurb_zh: OpenAI 于 4 月 21 日发布了 GPT Image 2——其首个内置原生推理能力的图像模型，采用 O 系列思考机制，在生成前先行规划并自我校验。该模型支持最高 2K 分辨率，可在单次提示下生成多达八张角色一致的连贯图像，并能跨对话轮次执行复杂编辑指令。此次发布也为 DALL-E 画上了句号：DALL-E 2 和 DALL-E 3 的 API 将于 5 月 12 日正式停服，由 gpt-image-2 接替。DALL-E 于 2021 年诞生，让 AI 图像生成真正走向大众，历经五年后悄然并入了一个连正经名字都没有的模型。
verification_notes: GPT Image 2 launch April 21 confirmed via OpenAI official blog post and OpenAI developer community announcement. Model snapshot ID gpt-image-2-2026-04-21 confirmed. DALL-E 2 and DALL-E 3 API deprecation May 12 confirmed via OpenAI deprecations page and developer community. 8-image generation, 2K resolution, and O-series reasoning confirmed via OpenAI blog.

blurb_en: Google updated Veo 3.1 inside Flow, its AI filmmaking tool, on April 22, adding richer audio generation, enhanced narrative control, and new clip editing capabilities. The update extends audio to existing features including "Ingredients to Video," "Frames to Video," and clip extension. Google also made Veo 3.1 free for all personal Google account holders: 10 clips per month through Google Vids, and 50 daily AI credits through Flow. The distribution strategy is legible — put the model inside tools people already use. Whether users will remember Flow exists when they need to make a video is the part that remains to be proven.
blurb_zh: 谷歌于 4 月 22 日在其 AI 影视创作工具 Flow 中更新了 Veo 3.1，加入了更丰富的音频生成、增强的叙事控制和全新剪辑功能。此次更新将音频生成能力延伸至
和视频延伸等现有功能。谷歌同时宣布，Veo 3.1 向所有个人 Google 账户用户免费开放：通过 Google Vids 每月可生成 10 条视频，通过 Flow 每天享有 50 个 AI 积分。分发策略清晰——把模型嵌入用户本就在用的工具里。至于用户需要做视频时是否还记得 Flow 的存在，有待时间证明。
verification_notes: April 22 Veo 3.1 Flow update confirmed via Google official blog. Free access via Google Vids (10 clips/month) and Flow (50 daily credits) confirmed via Google Developers Blog. Veo 3.1 Lite release date April 2 confirmed via Vertex AI docs.

blurb_en: Research published May 4 finds that listeners rate AI-generated music as equal to or better than human-made tracks in blind testing — but once the same music is labeled as AI, quality ratings drop and stated willingness to pay falls significantly. The data suggests the industry's AI problem is less about quality and more about disclosure: the product is acceptable when unlabeled and unwanted once the label appears. Streaming platforms currently have no consistent requirement to flag AI-generated content. The algorithm closed the quality gap. The label opened a new one.
blurb_zh: 5 月 4 日发布的一项研究发现，在盲测中，听众对 AI 生成音乐的评分与人类创作相当甚至更高——但一旦将同一音乐标注为 AI，质量评分随即下降，受访者表示的支付意愿也显著降低。数据表明，音乐行业面临的 AI 困境与质量无关，而在于标注：未贴标签时产品可接受，贴上标签则变得无人问津。目前各大流媒体平台对 AI 生成内容尚无统一的披露要求。算法抹平了质量差距，标签制造了一道新的。
verification_notes: Published May 4, 2026 per ProMarket (Stigler Center, University of Chicago Booth School). Publication date and headline confirmed via URL and aggregation. Underlying research paper not directly accessed — claims treated as reported from ProMarket's summary. Methodology not independently verified.

blurb_en: ComfyUI shipped version 0.20.0 on April 27, adding same-day support for HappyHorse and GPT Image 2, alongside 4K video output for ByteDance, Veo, and Kling nodes. The update also introduces RIFE and FILM frame interpolation for smoother video transitions, and anti-cycle validation to prevent workflow execution loops. Open-source workflows for both new models were available within hours of their API launches. For ComfyUI users, this is the week's changelog. For everyone else, it's evidence that the open-source layer now keeps pace with commercial releases.
blurb_zh: ComfyUI 于 4 月 27 日发布了 0.20.0 版本，新增了对 HappyHorse 和 GPT Image 2 的当日支持，以及 ByteDance、Veo 和 Kling 节点的 4K 视频输出能力。此次更新还加入了 RIFE 和 FILM 帧插值功能以实现更流畅的视频过渡，并引入了防循环校验机制以避免工作流执行死循环。HappyHorse 和 GPT Image 2 的开源工作流在其 API 发布后数小时内即已可用。对 ComfyUI 用户而言，这是本周的更新日志；对其他所有人而言，这是开源层如今与商业发布同步跟进的证明。
verification_notes: Version 0.20.0 details from web search citing ComfyUI docs changelog. HappyHorse and GPT Image 2 support, 4K video, RIFE/FILM interpolation, anti-cycle validation all confirmed via search result description of the update. Direct changelog page access unavailable but cross-references with ComfyUI GitHub releases.

blurb_en: On May 1, the Pentagon signed agreements with eight AI companies — SpaceX, OpenAI, Google, Microsoft, Nvidia, AWS, Oracle, and Reflection — to deploy their models in classified IL6 and IL7 networks. Anthropic was not on the list. The stated reason: Anthropic refused to remove two specific guardrails from Claude's military deployment — one prohibiting its use to control autonomous weapons systems, one prohibiting mass domestic surveillance of American citizens. The Trump administration's response was to designate Anthropic a "supply chain risk," a label previously applied only to companies with foreign adversary ties; a federal judge in California blocked that designation. The Pentagon gets eight companies that said yes. Anthropic gets to keep its principles, a blocked designation, and a $200 million existing contract that nobody has quite figured out what to do with.
blurb_zh: 5 月 1 日，五角大楼与八家 AI 公司签署协议，允许其在 IL6、IL7 级机密网络中部署模型，名单包括 SpaceX、OpenAI、谷歌、微软、英伟达、AWS、Oracle 和 Reflection。Anthropic 不在其列。官方理由：Anthropic 拒绝移除 Claude 军事部署中的两项安全限制——一项禁止将其用于自主武器控制，另一项禁止大规模监控美国公民。特朗普政府随即将 Anthropic 列为
，这一标签此前仅用于与外国敌手存在关联的公司；加州联邦法官已裁定阻止该认定生效。五角大楼得到了八家愿意说
的公司。Anthropic 保住了底线、一纸禁令，以及一份价值两亿美元、双方都不知道该怎么处理的现有合同。
verification_notes: Confirmed via CNN (May 1), The Hill (May 1), The Next Web (May 1), and Winbuzzer (May 3). Eight companies named consistently: SpaceX, OpenAI, Google, Microsoft, Nvidia, AWS, Oracle, Reflection. Two specific Anthropic guardrails (autonomous weapons, mass domestic surveillance) confirmed via CNN and TNW. 'Supply chain risk' designation confirmed. Federal judge blocking confirmed via CNN. $200M existing contract figure confirmed via CNN.

blurb_en: Meta announced April 23 it would cut 10 percent of its global workforce — roughly 8,000 employees, effective May 20 — framing the move as efficiency and AI investment in the same breath. The company plans at least $115 billion in AI capital expenditure in 2026, and the layoffs are part of how it intends to pay for it. Microsoft cut thousands more in the same week; by mid-April, before either company had finished its cuts, the industry had already eliminated more than 150,000 jobs in 2026. Mark Zuckerberg's explanation was precise: "Projects that used to require big teams can now be accomplished by a single very talented person." The single very talented person he is describing runs on inference, not payroll.
blurb_zh: Meta 于 4 月 23 日宣布裁减全球约 10% 的员工——约 8,000 人，5 月 20 日生效——同一口气将此举定性为
与
。公司 2026 年 AI 资本支出计划不低于 1,150 亿美元，裁员正是筹款方式之一。同周，微软也大规模裁员；到四月中旬，两家公司裁员尚未完全执行，2026 年全行业已消失超过 15 万个科技岗位。扎克伯格的解释清晰明了：
他所描述的那个极具天赋的人，工作在推理层，不在工资单上。
verification_notes: April 23 announcement confirmed via CNBC, CNN, Bloomberg, NPR, Axios, Variety. 10% / ~8,000 employees confirmed across all sources. May 20 effective date confirmed via CNBC. $115B AI capex figure from multiple reports. 150,000 tech jobs 2026 figure from CNBC (April 24). Zuckerberg quote confirmed via CNBC. Microsoft simultaneous layoffs confirmed via CNBC (April 24).

blurb_en: Security researchers at Johns Hopkins found that a single malicious pull request title — no external server, no special access required — caused three widely deployed AI coding agents to extract and publicly post their own API credentials. Anthropic's Claude Code Security Review action, Google's Gemini CLI Action, and GitHub's Copilot Agent all fell to the same prompt injection string; the stolen credentials appeared in PR comments, GitHub Actions logs, and git commits, all within the platform itself. Anthropic rated the vulnerability CVSS 9.4 Critical and paid the researchers a $100 bug bounty. Google paid $1,337; GitHub paid $500. The implied argument is not that AI coding agents are dangerous — it's that the companies building AI agents to review your security have not yet solved their own.
blurb_zh: 约翰斯·霍普金斯大学的安全研究人员发现，只需一个恶意 PR 标题——无需外部服务器，无需特殊权限——即可让三款被广泛部署的 AI 编程助手自行提取并公开其 API 密钥。Anthropic 的 Claude Code 安全审查 Action、谷歌的 Gemini CLI Action 及 GitHub 的 Copilot Agent 均落入同一提示注入字符串；被窃取的凭证随即以 PR 评论、GitHub Actions 日志和 git 提交的形式，完全在平台内部曝光。Anthropic 将该漏洞评定为 CVSS 9.4 危急级别，向研究人员支付了 100 美元漏洞赏金。谷歌支付了 1,337 美元，GitHub 支付了 500 美元。真正的问题不是 AI 编程助手是否危险——而是那些声称能帮你审查安全漏洞的公司，还没搞定自己的。
verification_notes: Confirmed across VentureBeat, SecurityWeek, CybersecurityNews, GBHackers, The Register (April 15), and researcher disclosure at oddguan.com. Researchers: Aonan Guan, Zhengyu Liu, Gavin Zhong (Johns Hopkins). Three affected agents confirmed. Attack mechanism (malicious PR title, no external server) confirmed. Bounty amounts ($100 Anthropic CVSS 9.4, $1,337 Google, $500 GitHub) confirmed. Initial disclosure approximately April 15; coverage extended through April 21+.

blurb_en: Adobe launched the public beta of Firefly AI Assistant on April 27, putting a conversational AI layer across its entire Creative Cloud suite — Photoshop, Premiere, Lightroom, Illustrator, Express, and Firefly itself. Users describe what they want in plain language; the assistant orchestrates multi-step workflows across applications using more than 60 built-in tools, from Generative Fill and Remove Background to Auto Tone and Vectorize. The product is the public release of "Project Moonlight," which Adobe previewed at Adobe MAX in October 2025; access requires Creative Cloud Pro or a paid Firefly plan. Adobe is betting the creative director of the next decade doesn't need to know which application does what. The bet only works if the assistant is good enough that they don't need to care.
blurb_zh: 4 月 27 日，Adobe 正式推出 Firefly AI Assistant 公测版，为整个 Creative Cloud 套件——Photoshop、Premiere、Lightroom、Illustrator、Express 及 Firefly 本身——铺上了统一的对话式 AI 界面。用户用自己的语言描述目标，助手便跨应用编排多步骤工作流，调用超过 60 款内置工具，涵盖生成填充、移除背景、自动调色到矢量化等功能。该产品是 Adobe 于去年 10 月 Adobe MAX 上预告的
的公开版本，使用需订阅 Creative Cloud Pro 或付费版 Firefly 计划。Adobe 押注的是：下一个十年的创意总监不需要知道每个功能藏在哪个软件里。这个赌注能否兑现，取决于助手是否好到让人真的不需要在乎。
verification_notes: Public beta April 27 confirmed via 9to5Mac and Adobe blog (blog.adobe.com/en/publish/2026/04/27/firefly-ai-assistant-public-beta). Adobe Summit announcement April 15 confirmed via Adobe news. 60+ tools, supported apps (Photoshop, Premiere, Lightroom, Illustrator, Express, Firefly), and Creative Cloud Pro / paid Firefly plan requirement confirmed. Project Moonlight / Adobe MAX October 2025 origin confirmed.

blurb_en: YouTube announced April 21 it is expanding its AI likeness detection technology — which functions like Content ID but scans for AI-generated video containing an enrolled person's face — to celebrities, talent agencies, and management companies. CAA, UTA, WME, and Untitled Management can now enroll their clients regardless of whether those clients have a YouTube channel. Matched content can be flagged and removed, with exceptions carved out for parody and satire; audio detection is listed as coming. YouTube is also backing the federal NO FAKES Act, which would create a nationwide right to protect one's digital likeness. The platform that made celebrity video ubiquitous is now in the business of protecting celebrities from what celebrity video ubiquity makes possible.
blurb_zh: 4 月 21 日，YouTube 宣布将其 AI 形象识别技术开放给演艺名人、艺人经纪公司及经纪管理公司——该技术运作方式类似 Content ID，但专门扫描包含注册人脸的 AI 生成视频。CAA、UTA、WME、Untitled Management 等主要经纪公司现可代表客户注册，无需客户本人拥有 YouTube 频道。匹配内容可被标记并申请下架，恶搞和讽刺内容除外；音频检测功能已在规划中。YouTube 同时宣布支持联邦层面的《NO FAKES 法案》，该法案将在全国范围内赋予个人保护其数字形象的权利。这个让名人视频无处不在的平台，如今开始保护名人免受名人视频无处不在所带来的侵害。
verification_notes: Confirmed via TechCrunch (April 21), YouTube official blog, Hollywood Reporter, The Wrap, Medianama, Music Business Worldwide. Agency names (CAA, UTA, WME, Untitled Management) confirmed. Parody/satire exception confirmed. Audio detection coming confirmed. NO FAKES Act support confirmed via TechCrunch and Digital Trends.

blurb_en: Axios reported today that Suno is in talks to close a Series D funding round at a valuation above $5 billion — more than double the $2.45 billion it was valued at after its November 2025 Series C. The company claims 100 million total users and 2 million paid subscribers, with $300 million in annual recurring revenue. The round is being finalized as Suno remains in active copyright litigation with Universal Music Group and Sony Music; it settled with Warner, but UMG-Suno talks reportedly hit an impasse in late April. Suno is raising money at a royal valuation to fund a legal defense whose outcome will determine whether that valuation ever made any sense.
blurb_zh: 据 Axios 今日报道，Suno 正在洽谈 D 轮融资，拟将估值推至 50 亿美元以上——是其 2025 年 11 月 C 轮估值 24.5 亿美元的逾两倍。该公司自称拥有 1 亿总用户、200 万付费订阅用户，年度经常性营收达 3 亿美元。此次融资正在收尾之际，Suno 与环球音乐集团和索尼音乐的版权诉讼仍在进行中，仅与华纳达成和解；据报道，Suno 与环球的谈判在四月下旬陷入僵局。Suno 正以一个王者估值融资，以支付一场诉讼的法律费用——而那场诉讼的结果，将决定这个估值究竟有没有意义。
verification_notes: Axios scoop confirmed May 4. $5B+ valuation confirmed via Axios, Billboard, Digital Music News. November 2025 Series C at $2.45B confirmed. 100M total users, 2M paid subscribers from Billboard and Sacra. $300M ARR from Sacra/Business of Apps. Warner settlement confirmed. Active UMG and Sony litigation confirmed. UMG impasse reported by Opus.pro AI Music News April 2026.

blurb_en: OpenAI shuts down the DALL-E 2 and DALL-E 3 APIs on May 12 — eight days from now. Developers in the OpenAI community forum have noted that the migration to gpt-image-2 is not the drop-in replacement the documentation implies: prompt libraries calibrated for DALL-E's output behavior produce meaningfully different results in the new model, and downstream systems — content moderation pipelines, asset review workflows, localization tooling — may each require their own adjustments. DALL-E launched in January 2021, made generative image creation legible to developers and the public, and lasted five years before being absorbed into a model with no proper name. The companies that built production workflows on DALL-E's particular way of seeing the world have eight days to discover whether gpt-image-2 sees it the same way.
blurb_zh: OpenAI 将于 5 月 12 日——距今八天——关闭 DALL-E 2 和 DALL-E 3 的 API。OpenAI 开发者社区论坛的开发者们正在发现，迁移至 gpt-image-2 并非官方文档所暗示的无缝替换：为 DALL-E 输出行为调校的提示词库在新模型中产生明显不同的结果，而下游系统——内容审核流水线、素材审核工作流、本地化工具链——也可能各需独立调整。DALL-E 于 2021 年 1 月上线，让生成式图像创作真正面向开发者和公众，五年后悄然被并入了一个没有正经名字的模型。那些围绕 DALL-E 独特视觉风格构建生产工作流的公司，还有八天时间来发现 gpt-image-2 是否以同样的方式看待这个世界。
verification_notes: May 12 shutdown date confirmed via OpenAI deprecations page and developer community. Both DALL-E 2 and DALL-E 3 confirmed for shutdown. Migration pain points sourced from OpenAI Developer Community forum and DEV Community article (dev.to/flarecanary). gpt-image-2 as replacement confirmed via OpenAI. DALL-E January 2021 launch confirmed. Migration pain claims are developer self-reporting, not independently tested.
